_schema: 6-beat structure per CLAUDE.md law 5. ALL text below is scratch placeholder awaiting Director wording (law 6).

intro_cold.speaker: marge
intro_cold.text: [BLANK M1 — DISTRUSTED Marge, grammar budget 1-2 sentences MAX: answers the door, volunteers nothing, no humor. The board behind her does the talking. Awaiting Director.]

intro_trusted.speaker: marge
intro_trusted.text: [BLANK M2 — TRUSTED Marge, grammar budget 4-7 sentences: volunteers a rumor or a heads-up about the board, and asks the player a question back. Awaiting Director.]

options.text: [BLANK M3 — the player's answer to her question. Awaiting Director.]

intro.speaker: marge
intro.text: [Situation — Marge at the contract board, quick and clipped, sizing you up between clipboard checks.]

options.text: [IT option — pitch her: the co-op's posted rates are off, you ran the numbers.]
options.label: [IT Nephew]

options.text: [Small talk — ask what's moving through the co-op this week.]

audit_success.speaker: marge
audit_success.text: [Result — she rechecks your math, finds you're right, respects it. Sandy will hear the co-op got shown up.]

audit_failure.speaker: marge
audit_failure.text: [Good failure — your math missed the fuel surcharge, publicly. The diner will call you the spreadsheet farmer by supper.]

chat.speaker: marge
chat.text: [Flavor — one working detail about co-op traffic this week; should reference the season/day rhythm.]
